author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered – Pre-order Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered launches on Nintendo Switch 2 on August 11, 2026! Pre-order today: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/the-elder-scrolls-iv-oblivion-remastered-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1057-01&utm_id=P1057-01 

The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered brings Bethesda Game Studios’s classic open-world RPG to players with stunning new visuals, refined gameplay, and the complete story experience! 

#TheElderScrollsIV #OblivionRemastered 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains – Launch Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Play Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains now on Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/monopoly-star-wars-heroes-vs-villains-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1057-01&utm_id=P1057-01 

Monopoly evolves with a bold Star Wars twist! Experience team-based play, character abilities, and dynamic board moments that can change the game with every roll.  

#Monopoly #StarWarsvsVillains 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s
